news_summary: Flutter Entertainment reported strong 2025 highlights with $16.4BN in revenue and a 17% YoY group revenue growth.
The company's US operations, particularly FanDuel, showed robust growth with a 20% revenue increase and 82% adjusted EBITDA growth, solidifying its market leadership.
International markets also demonstrated resilience with 14% revenue growth, driven by strong performance in Southern Europe and Africa, and strategic integrations and investments planned for 2026.
DraftKings reported strong Q1 2024 results with revenue of $829 million, exceeding expectations.
The company saw a significant increase in Net Gaming Revenue (NGR) to $1.1 billion, driven by strong player engagement and product innovation.
Despite a net loss per share of $0.14, DraftKings continues to invest in growth, as evidenced by the expansion into prediction markets.
Entain PLC experienced a significant financial impact of £500 million due to tax changes.
The company anticipates that gambling tax hikes will lead to a contraction of the regulated market.
Entain PLC reported strong financial performance in its Full Year 2025 earnings call.
Evolution AB (EVVTY) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges and Expanding Horizons.
Playtech stock plunges 30% after Evolution names it in legal complaint.
Analysis of Evolution's 2025 valuation considering recent share price fluctuations and a 15% slide.
